flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Drexel University rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($25.5k → $31.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Drexel University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Drexel University are 43% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($84.6k vs $59.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Drexel University rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (59.8% → 66.2%).
